# CWE-266 — Incorrect Privilege Assignment (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-266-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Membership struct {
	UserID uint
	Role   string
}

// Vulnerable: trusts client-supplied role when provisioning access.
func InviteMember(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	role := c.Query("role")
	m := Membership{UserID: 42, Role: role}
	db.Create(&m)
	c.JSON(201, gin.H{"role": role})
}
